# Third-Party Automation References

This directory stores narrow snapshots of external module guidance that this project
uses when generating Foundry-compatible JSON.

Scope:
- `midi-qol`: workflow automation, on-use macros, item macros, activity identifiers
- `midi-item-showcase-community`: proven activity/macro wiring patterns that rely on midi-qol

Notes:
- These files are summaries, not full mirrors.
- Keep them small and citation-oriented.
- When behavior is uncertain, prefer validating against the live module UI and exported JSON.
